entities.name: MALI
entities.description: A country in West Africa where the heritage system and farming practices are described

entities.name: HERITAGE SYSTEM
entities.description: A social system in Mali that attributes land ownership primarily to men

entities.name: LAND
entities.description: The physical resource used for farming, often marginal when accessed by women in Mali

entities.name: TOUBA SYLLA
entities.description: A village in Mali where Malado Cissé resides

entities.name: RIC4REC TRAINING
entities.description: Training program on the implementation of climate-resilient agriculture

entities.name: CLIMATE-RESILIENT AGRICULTURE
entities.description: An agricultural approach designed to withstand climate variability for sustainable production

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE FARMING PRODUCTION
entities.description: The objective of maintaining agricultural productivity over the long term

relationships.description: Mali's social structure includes a specific heritage system regarding land
The heritage system determines the attribution and ownership of land
Touba Sylla is a village located within Mali
The training focuses on the implementation of climate-resilient agriculture
Climate-resilient agriculture is used to achieve sustainable farming production
